step_rationale: Microparticles with both P-selectin and tissue factor; bridge platelet activation and coagulation.
mechanism: CD62P+TF+ microparticles simultaneously mark platelet activation and deliver tissue factor to amplify thrombus formation.

references.title: Microparticles during long-term follow-up after acute myocardial infarction. Association to atherosclerotic burden and risk of cardiovascular events.
